Motion For An Order Compelling Compliance With Subpoena Duces Tecum
Off Calendar Jul-26-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Michelle Yoshida for defendant and moving party: Pedro Ferreira, Maria Ferreira, Jorge Avalos and Rolando Avalos
Raquel Fox for plaintiff and opposing party: Maria Esperanza Aguilar

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant's motion to compel compliance with subpoena for production of medical records is granted. The Court has reviewed the complaint and responses to defendant's form and special interrogatories and finds good cause for the production of the records. The custodian of records for San Francisco General Hospital and Southeast Mission Geriatric Services are ordered to produce the requested records from January 1, 2000 to the present. ORDER SIGNED. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-30-2005 Set For Trial On Jan-03-06 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Dec-14-05 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 306
